'''Vess Kogo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]]. After [[Vess Kogo's mother|his mother]] was injured as a bystander during a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] protest against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] taxes on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hanofar]], Kogo developed a burning hatred for the Rebellion, which he fueled with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] after becoming one of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] Hands. As an agent of the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]], Kogo often carried out missions requiring little subtlety but a substantial amount of destruction. His obsession with the Rebel Alliance often caused him to take detours during his missions, during which he pursued agents of the Rebellion in acts of vengeance.

==Biography==
[[File:Hands.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Vess Kogo and Mara Jade]]
Vess Kogo was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived during the period immediately surrounding the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was still an unorganized effort conducted by many disparate groups. After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] began taxing the citizens of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hanofar]], one Rebel group conducted a protest that soon went out of control. This incident ended in the injury of many innocent bystanders, including [[Vess Kogo's mother|Kogo's mother]]. Kogo blamed his mother's injury on the Rebellion and developed an extreme hatred for the group.<ref name="RESB" />

Kogo was soon recruited by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to serve as one of his [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hands]], a secret group of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-sensitive [[operative]]s loyal only to the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]]. Palpatine used the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] to fuel Kogo's hatred of the Rebellion and turned him into a [[Death/Legends|killing]] machine. Like the other Emperor's Hands, Kogo thought that he was the Emperor's only operative and swore complete loyalty to him. Palpatine often used Kogo for missions requiring pure force, but Kogo sometimes deviated from his objectives to hunt down agents of the Rebellion, a habit that once almost ended in him failing the Emperor. Sometime shortly after the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]], Kogo came into conflict with a group of individuals affiliated with the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="RESB" />

==Personality and traits==
Vess Kogo was a ruggedly handsome young man with deep [[black]] hair and a disarming smile, all physical traits that he used to seduce enemy female agents.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|223|Kogo, Vess}}</ref> He harbored a deep hatred for the Rebellion and often diverged from his assigned mission in order to hunt and [[Death/Legends|kill]] Rebel operatives and sympathizers. This obsession never caused him to fail the Emperor in his assigned duties, but at one point he came close to doing so. Palpatine never used Kogo for subtle missions, but when he required pure mayhem and destruction, he often turned to the young Hand.<ref name="RESB" />

==Powers and abilities==
Under the tutelage of Emperor Palpatine, Vess Kogo learned to augment his hatred for the Rebellion through the use of the dark side. Although he received the same training in advanced combat and espionage as the other Emperor's Hands, Kogo was notably more developed in his Force talents than some of the others, including [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. Despite serving the Emperor for a shorter amount of time than Jade, Kogo possessed the potential to surpass her in almost every area. Kogo was proficient in many [[Force power/Legends|Force abilities]] in the realms of [[Force power/Legends#Alter|Alter]] and [[Force power/Legends#Sense|Sense]], including [[Mind trick/Legends|affect mind]], [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]], [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]], [[Force valor]], and [[Mind trick/Legends#Force fear|Force fear]]. 

==Equipment==
He often carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]] with him on missions.<ref name="RESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vess Kogo was first referenced in the [[2001]] ''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'' written by [[Bill Slavicsek]], [[Steve Miller]], and [[Owen K.C. Stephens]].
